page_metadata.biotools__summary: Describe and share tabular data. It includes three components: (1) the Excel add-in; (2) the public web client; and (3) the private web service that mediates between the add-in and client and the ONEShare repository
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Describe and share tabular data. It includes three components: (1) the Excel add-in; (2) the public web client; and (3) the private web service that mediates between the add-in and client and the ONEShare repository
